summary: Maeda has flipped bullish in his most recent video, explicitly arguing that the crypto market bottom is in and anticipating higher prices for Bitcoin.
narrative: He believes the market is currently bottoming and suggests that specific leverage mechanisms like STRC could propel BTC to new highs, directly contradicting the popular four-year cycle theorists who expect further downside. This marks a decisive shift from his previous strategy of aggressively shorting Ethereum during late 2025 and early 2026.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
